name: @ramassa/media-worker
description: Cloudflare Worker that mints short-TTL presigned R2 upload URLs for authenticated users (ADR-002, RAPP-14). It never touches file bytes in production: it authenticates, authorizes, validates, and signs.

scripts.deploy:production: wrangler deploy --env production --var SENTRY_RELEASE:$(git rev-parse HEAD)
scripts.cors:dev: wrangler r2 bucket cors set ramassa-media-dev --jurisdiction eu --file r2-cors.dev.json
scripts.cors:production: wrangler r2 bucket cors set ramassa-media-production --jurisdiction eu --file r2-cors.production.json
